title: Jacob's Quest Anniversary Edition
description:
Вышло обновлениеJacob's Quest Anniversary Edition has Full Controller Support.

Об игреJacob’s Quest: 10th Anniversary Edition HD is finally here — a completely reimagined, modern rebuild of the beloved JRPG. Owners of the original game receive this massive upgrade free, now enhanced with stunning effects, beautifully upscaled sprites, and a full suite of modern features.

Celebrate a decade of adventure with a version rebuilt from the ground up for today’s PCs, widescreen displays, and controllers. Whether you’re returning to Jacob’s world or discovering it for the first time, this is the definitive way to experience the legend.

Become a LegendDive into a vibrant elemental world, rescue the four sacred crystals, and stop a sinister plot threatening all life. Designed for newcomers and JRPG veterans alike, Jacob’s Quest delivers classic 90s charm with modern enhancements and fast, satisfying progression.

FEATURESA World Reborn• Explore a vast elemental realm filled with dungeons, secrets, puzzles, and powerful bosses

• Hand‑drawn sprites enhanced with modern post‑processing and visual effects

• A fully reworked presentation built for HD and ultrawide displays

A Soundtrack That Hits Hard• An addictive, energetic score featuring electric‑guitar‑driven themes

• Immersive ambience that brings Jacob’s world to life

Classic JRPG Gameplay — Modernized• Turn‑based battles inspired by the golden age of 90s RPGs

• A huge roster of spells, abilities, and tactical options

• Action‑layered exploration: jump, hookshot, block puzzles, and more

Compelling Characters & Adventure• Memorable heroes, allies, and villains

• A story crafted for fans of classic JRPGs — heartfelt, adventurous, and nostalgic.

Steam Deck CompatibilityTested by Valve and rated Playable on Steam Deck.
description_short: Become a Legend in Jacob's Quest Anniversary Edition, a JRPG that anyone can pick up and play. Save the four crystals of the world and prevent a vile plot from unfolding. With epic battles and world progression, Jacob's Quest is the RPG of choice. Now remade from the ground up for modern gaming!
